generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text introduced a new perspective on alliance commitment, suggesting that allies may not be contributing equally. This made me reconsider the value of our current defense commitments, slightly reducing my support.

request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually benefiting more from our defense commitments than we are? While we're spending billions on mutual defense, they're cutting corners on their own preparedness. It's time to rethink how we share the burden. #NationalSecurity #AllianceFairness
